arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid eyeing summer move for Manchester City midfielder
arts.sum: It is no secret that Atletico Madrid are chasing the signing of a new defensive midfielder, and the club hopes to end their search during the summer. Diego Simeone currently has Pablo Barrios, Rodrigo De Paul, Koke Resurreccion and Conor Gallagher as first team options – and also Thomas Lemar, although he is not counted […] The post Atletico Madrid eyeing summer move for Manchester City midfielder appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Yamal named in Barça squad for Atleti 1st leg
arts.sum: Szczesny; Kounde, Araujo, Cubarsí, Balde; De Jong, Pedri; Yamal, Olmo, Raphinha; Lewandowski Lamine Yamal has recovered in time from the foot injury he suffered in the weekend win over Las Palmas and has been named in the 22-man squad for Tuesday’s Copa del Rey semi-final first leg against Atlético Madrid.

arts.ttl: Simeone praises ‘humble’ Alvarez amid match-winning brace at Valencia
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid coach Diego Simeone spoke to the media ahead of the Copa del Rey semi-final first leg against FC Barcelona on Tuesday night, addressing a number of questions on fitness of his players, taking on Barcelona and the fixture list. “He has the ability to transmit to the players the style of play he is proposing, I think the arrival of Flick has done Barcelona a lot of good,” he explained.
